name: InfuSystem Holdings, Inc
summary: InfuSystem Holdings, Inc. is a healthcare services company providing ambulatory infusion services and related products. The company delivers infusion therapy services to patients, primarily through pump rentals and services to oncology and other specialty practices. InfuSystem supports healthcare providers with medical equipment, including ambulatory infusion pumps, and manages billing and logistics for infusion treatments.

products.name: Ambulatory Infusion Pumps
products.description: Portable infusion pumps rented and serviced for outpatient and home infusion therapy, primarily oncology.

products.name: Infusion Therapy Services
products.description: End-to-end ambulatory infusion services including pump management, billing, and logistics for healthcare providers.
